calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Loudoun County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Loudoun County Public Schools is Monday, August 17, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Loudoun County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Loudoun County Public Schools is Friday, June 11, 2027. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Loudoun County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Loudoun County Public Schools runs Mar 22, 2027–Mar 26, 2027, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Starts Much Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: First day shifts from Sep 2 to Aug 17 — the largest single-year start-date change in recent LCPS history.

yearNumbers.label: Diwali Observed
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide for Diwali — a new cultural holiday added to the LCPS calendar this year.

yearNumbers.label: Lunar New Year
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide for Lunar New Year — another new cultural holiday added this year.

yearNumbers.label: Eid al-Fitr
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide for Eid al-Fitr — one of four cultural holidays newly observed as full school holidays in 2026–2027.

events.name: New Year's Day / Winter Break End
Last Day of School / End of Quarter 4

calendarNotes: LCPS starts the 2026–2027 school year on August 17, 2026, about a week before neighboring Fairfax County and Prince William County, and classes end on June 11, 2027. All three districts share the same March 22–26 Spring Break this year, making it easier for families with children across district lines to coordinate spring break plans. Four cultural holidays are district-wide no-school days: Yom Kippur (September 21), Diwali (November 9), Lunar New Year (February 5), and Eid al-Fitr (March 9). Their dates change each year because all four follow lunar or lunisolar calendars.
